APODExplorer

Overview

🔭
Purpose
Daily NASA astronomy image viewer with archive browsing from 1995 to today
📱

30+ years of NASA astronomy archive — favorites, sharing, download all built in
// About the project

APOD Explorer was built to make NASA's incredible astronomy archive more accessible and beautiful on mobile. Every day NASA publishes a new astronomy image — this app fetches it live via their official API and presents it in a clean, dark-themed interface designed to let the images speak for themselves. The app supports browsing the entire 30-year archive by date, saving favorites, random discovery, and sharing stunning space images with anyone.

features.json
03 /

Features

🌅
Daily Picture
Automatically fetches today's NASA astronomy picture on launch — always fresh, always stunning.
📅
Browse Archive
Date picker lets you explore any astronomy image from NASA's archive dating back to June 1995.
🔀
Random APOD
Discover random astronomy pictures from across 30 years of NASA's collection with one tap.
❤️
Favorites
Save your favorite astronomy pictures locally for quick access and offline viewing anytime.
📤
Share & Download
Share stunning space images or download them as wallpapers directly from the app.
🌙
Dark Theme UI
Beautiful dark interface with animated star particle background — designed around the cosmos.
